introduce.name: introduce
introduce.title: AI-Enhanced Chinese Zodiac Analysis
introduce.label: Introduction
introduce.description: The Chinese Zodiac tradition, now enhanced with cutting-edge AI technology, provides unprecedented accuracy in analyzing the 12-year cycle, elemental attributes, and personalized destiny forecasts.

items.title: AI-Powered Zodiac Identification
items.description: Our advanced algorithms precisely identify your zodiac sign among the 12 animals: Rat, Ox, Tiger, Rabbit, Dragon, Snake, Horse, Goat, Monkey, Rooster, Dog, and Pig.

items.title: Machine Learning Element Analysis
items.description: AI-driven analysis of the Chinese Five Elements (Wood, Fire, Earth, Metal, and Water) reveals their complex interactions with your zodiac sign for deeper personality insights.

items.title: Predictive AI Forecasting
items.description: Our AI system analyzes the 60-year cycle created by animals and elements to generate highly accurate fortune predictions, compatibility matches, and life guidance.

feature.name: feature

items.title: AI Personality Profiling

items.title: Smart Compatibility Algorithm

items.title: AI-Recommended Lucky Elements

faq.name: faq
faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Common Questions About Our AI Chinese Zodiac System
faq.description: Have more questions about our AI technology? Contact us through our support channels.

items.title: How does your AI determine my Chinese zodiac sign?
items.description: Our AI system precisely calculates your Chinese zodiac sign based on the lunar year of your birth according to the traditional Chinese calendar, using advanced algorithms to ensure accuracy even with calendar variations.

items.title: What AI technology analyzes the Five Elements interaction with my zodiac?
items.description: We use proprietary machine learning models to analyze how the Five Elements (Wood, Fire, Earth, Metal, and Water) combine with the 12 animal signs, creating personalized insights about your character and destiny.

items.title: How accurate are your AI-generated zodiac predictions?
items.description: Our AI predictions combine thousands of years of traditional Chinese zodiac wisdom with modern data science and machine learning. Our algorithms are trained on historical patterns and continuously improved for maximum accuracy.

items.title: Can the AI suggest ways to improve my fortune based on my zodiac?
items.description: Yes! Our AI generates personalized recommendations for lucky colors, numbers, directions, and activities based on your specific zodiac-element combination to help balance your energies and potentially enhance different areas of your life.

items.title: How does the AI create my 2025 prediction?
items.description: Our artificial intelligence analyzes how the Year of the Snake (2025) will interact with your personal zodiac sign and element, using complex algorithms to process traditional compatibility patterns and provide detailed life forecasts.

items.title: What data does your AI use to generate my zodiac reading?
items.description: Our AI system utilizes your birthdate alongside a comprehensive database of traditional Chinese astrology, modern psychological insights, and pattern recognition to generate deeply personalized zodiac readings without storing any personal information.
